zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrrix van Grimbergen於從1090年到1105年出生在比利時時，她的父親Walter I Wouter Draekenbaard van Berthout Grimbergen en Mechelen49歲，母親Adeline de Bocholt51歲。她和Hugo d'Enghien至少有6個兒子和2個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beatrrix van Grimbergen于从1090年到1105年出生在比利时时，她的父亲Walter I Wouter Draekenbaard van Berthout Grimbergen en Mechelen49岁，母亲Adeline de Bocholt51岁。她和Hugo d'Enghien至少有6个儿子和2个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Beatrrix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name, which was borne by a saint martyred in Rome, together with Saints Faustinus and Simplicius, in the early 4th century. The original form of the name was probably Viatrix, a feminine version of Viator ‘voyager (through life)’, which was a favourite name among early Christians. This was then altered by association with Latin Beatus ‘blessed’ (Via- and Bea- sometimes being pronounced the same in Late Latin). See also Beatrice .

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrrix van Grimbergen was born from 1090 to 1105, in Belgium, her father, Walter I Wouter Draekenbaard van Berthout Grimbergen en Mechelen, was 49 and her mother, Adeline de Bocholt, was 51. She had at least 6 sons and 2 daughters with Hugo d'Enghien.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrrix van Grimbergen est née du 1090 au 1105, à Belgique, son père, Walter I Wouter Draekenbaard van Berthout Grimbergen en Mechelen, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Adeline de Bocholt, avait 51 ans. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles avec Hugo d'Enghien.

de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrrix van Grimbergen von 1090 bis 1105 in Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Walter I Wouter Draekenbaard van Berthout Grimbergen en Mechelen 49 und ihre Mutter Adeline de Bocholt 51. Sie hatte mit Hugo d'Enghien mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrrix van Grimbergen è nata il da 1090 a 1105 nel Belgio, sua padre, Walter I Wouter Draekenbaard van Berthout Grimbergen en Mechelen, aveva 49 anni e sua madre, Adeline de Bocholt, aveva 51 anni. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie con Hugo d'Enghien.

ja.lifeSummary: Beatrrix van Grimbergenがから1090年まで1105年にベルギーで生まれた時，父Walter I Wouter Draekenbaard van Berthout Grimbergen en Mechelenは49歳，母Adeline de Bocholtは51歳であった。彼女はHugo d'Enghienとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrrix van Grimbergen(이)가 1090년 부터 1105년 까지 벨기에에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter I Wouter Draekenbaard van Berthout Grimbergen en Mechelen(은)는 49세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adeline de Bocholt(은)는 51세였다. 그녀는 Hugo d'Enghien(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrrix van Grimbergen nasceu de 1090 a 1105, em Bélgica, seu pai, Walter I Wouter Draekenbaard van Berthout Grimbergen en Mechelen, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Adeline de Bocholt, tinha 51 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas com Hugo d'Enghien.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrrix van Grimbergen родилась с 1090 по 1105 в местности Бельгия, её отцу по имени Walter I Wouter Draekenbaard van Berthout Grimbergen en Mechelen было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Adeline de Bocholt, 51. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери от Hugo d'Enghien.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Beatrrix van Grimbergen nació desde 1090 hasta 1105, en Bélgica, su papá, Walter I Wouter Draekenbaard van Berthout Grimbergen en Mechelen, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Adeline de Bocholt, tenía 51 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas con Hugo d'Enghien.
